word: The machines were still at it.
The hole the machines had dug was like the crater of a volcano.
meaning: 기계들이 판 구멍은 화산의 분화구와 같았다.

word: Not to give up until they had caught the fox.
meaning: 여우를 잡을 때까지 포기하지 않기로 했다.
우리는 결코 그를 놓아주지 않을 거야.

word: They were tired and stiff from driving the tractors all day.
meaning: 그들은 하루 종일 트랙터를 운전해서 피곤하고 몸이 뻣뻣했다.

word: He'll come out in the end.
